name: Tool result
goal: Display the return value of a tool/function call with status-driven accent treatment — the standalone counterpart to ce-tool-call for agent traces and detached result panels.
description: Pure-presentation brick for showing an agent tool return value without the collapsible call header. A coloured left border keys off status: green for ok, red for error, neutral border for empty. When name or duration-ms are provided, a compact monospace header row appears above the content. The default slot holds the result payload; when status='error' the payload area is replaced by the named 'error' slot. A meta slot adds an optional footer row (e.g. a cached/streamed chip). When status='empty' and the default slot has no assigned content, a muted '(no result)' placeholder renders. The compact boolean tightens padding for inline-trace contexts.

props.name: name
props.description: Optional tool/function name displayed as the result label in the header row.

props.name: status
props.description: Status drives the left-border accent: ok=green, error=red, empty=neutral border color.

props.name: durationMs
props.description: Optional wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Formatted as '123 ms' under 1s, '1.2 s' above. Omitted when not finite.

props.name: compact
props.description: Tighter padding mode for inline-trace placement in agent traces.

slots.description: The result content — commonly a <pre> JSON dump, a plain string, or rich content. Hidden when status='error'.

slots.name: error
slots.description: Error details — shown ONLY when status='error', replacing the default slot area.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Optional metadata footer — e.g. a <ce-chip> indicating cached or streamed result. Hidden when empty.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Default outer border and empty-status left accent.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red
cssVariables.description: Left-border accent for status='error', and error slot text tint.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Duration text, empty placeholder, and meta footer text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Duration text size and meta footer font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Header row font size, body pre font size, empty placeholder size, and compact mode font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Block outer margin, compact padding, header bottom margin, and meta top spacing.

a11y.notes: Block is pure presentation. The status is conveyed through the left-border accent color and optionally through the name text. Consumers needing programmatic status announcements should manage aria-live externally.
